parameters.label: Model
parameters.helpText: Optional provider-defined model identifier that can be referenced from websocket query params and request packets.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide a valid model for custom TTS.

parameters.label: Language
parameters.helpText: Optional provider-defined language code that can be referenced from websocket query params and request packets.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide a valid language for custom TTS.

parameters.label: Voice ID
parameters.helpText: Plain voice identifier that can be bound into websocket query params and request packets.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide a valid voice ID for custom TTS.

parameters.label: Audio Encoding
parameters.helpText: Available to websocket DSL bindings as "encoding".
parameters.errorMessage: Please select a valid audio encoding for custom TTS.

parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.helpText: Available to websocket DSL bindings as "sample_rate".
parameters.errorMessage: Please select a valid sample rate for custom TTS.

parameters.label: Query Parameters
parameters.helpText: Optional flat JSON object for dynamic websocket query params. Use {"$var":"..."} and optional {"$cast":"number","value":...} bindings.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide valid query parameters for custom TTS.

parameters.label: Text Request
parameters.helpText: Required JSON object for the primary websocket request. Use {"$var":"text"}, {"$var":"message_id"}, and optional {"$cast":...} expressions.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide a valid text request for custom TTS.

parameters.label: Done Request
parameters.helpText: Optional JSON object for two-step flows. If present, runtime sends this follow-up packet after the text request. If omitted, runtime uses one-shot mode.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide a valid done request for custom TTS.

parameters.label: Response Parser
parameters.helpText: Required JSON rule list for websocket responses. Each rule defines a frame match and emit expressions for audio, message_id, done, and error.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide a valid response parser for custom TTS.
